components.notes: Industrial/maker dark chrome: PCB-green palette, monospace typography, scan-line texture. Structural .hw-* layout classes live in the HardwareHero widget; compose that alongside any page that uses this theme.
Composes its look from four separately-installed Widget .ideas by string id; bundles only its own chrome (theme.css).
Self-contained chrome scoped under .theme-light.
Display typeface widget; emits one stylesheet, registers a font family + token.
Attic display typeface; base64-embedded @font-face, exposes --font-attic.
Back-home glyph/link widget.
Animated console-bg effects engine (js + circuitboard image assets); paints into layers rendered by the Cyberspace theme.
Sacred-geometry animation (js); composed by LegionPersonas.
Tooltip behavior + styling (css + js); composed by Frontpage.
Razor widget; renders a table of contents. Inline markup, no bundled assets.
Canonical smallest widget; click-counter is a live interactive-render smoke test. Fully inline, no assets.
Frontpage hub widget (SiteNav/NavTabItem, hub.json seed data, cover images).
Persona gallery widget (PersonaCard/PersonaDetail, personas.json). Detail panel uses ModalPopup widget.

Full-featured Blazor modal component. Parameters: IsOpen (bool, default true), Title, ShowClose (bool?, default true), ShowHeader, ShowFooter, ConfirmText, CancelText, WrapForm (wraps dialog in <form> for submit), Size (sm/md/lg/xl/full, default md), Config (JSON string — fallback defaults; typed params win), ChildContent, OnClose, OnConfirm, OnCancel. CSS always emitted so .ma-modal* classes work for plain-HTML callers. Standalone modalpopup.js retained for non-Blazor Escape/backdrop delegation.
Angular-Material-style outlined text field; typed [Parameter] props plus pass-through attributes. Folded from a Control to a Widget (MAI-A19).
Baseline set (MAIL-A3). Site nav bar; links= attribute or nav.links site setting (per-site menus); hamburger below 720px.
Baseline set (MAIL-A3). Trail derived lexically from slug segments; renders nothing on the home page.
Baseline set (MAIL-A3). Banner with title/subtitle/CTA; background via imageclass= (inline base64 CSS class convention) or image=.
Baseline set (MAIL-A3). Content card (imageclass=/image=, title, text, href, footer); ships the .ma-cards responsive grid helper.
Baseline set (MAIL-A3). Activator: chrome for native <details> groups in .ma-accordion; data-exclusive keeps one open.
Baseline set (MAIL-A3). Activator: .ma-tabs sections with data-title become an ARIA tab control; ma-tabs-board = the mindattic.com tile board.
Baseline set (MAIL-A3). Activator: .ma-gallery grid of base64-class tiles; linked tiles = books grid, unlinked tiles get a lightbox.
Baseline set (MAIL-A3). Activator: .ma-carousel of .ma-slide children — arrows, dots, keyboard, optional data-autoplay.
Baseline set (MAIL-A3). CSS-only activator: .ma-callout info/success/warn/error admonition boxes; glyph icons, no images.
Baseline set (MAIL-A3). Activator: dresses every pre>code with chrome, copy button, data-lang badge. Highlighting = V2 candidate.
Baseline set (MAIL-A3). Responsive player: YouTube/Vimeo URLs become privacy-friendly embeds; other URLs (incl. data:) render native <video>.
Baseline set (MAIL-A3). Name/email/message form POSTing to action= or the contact.action site setting; honeypot included; renders a config hint when unset.
Baseline set (MAIL-A3). Icon row for GitHub/X/LinkedIn/YouTube/email/website/RSS; inline SVG path data (no icon files); social.* site-setting fallbacks.
Baseline set (MAIL-A3). Activator: zero author markup — a floating scroll-to-top button appears after one screen of scroll.
Baseline set (MAIL-A3). Activator: chrome + the mindattic.com pin-when-short behavior for any author-written footer.ma-footer.

mindattic.com verbatim set (MAIL-A5). The project-board engine: .tabButton/.tabPage styles + board script (panel lift, procedural tile art, localStorage persistence, single-active click handling); window.TabBoard.build/art/images for data-built boards. Placement option alwaysShowTabPage=true keeps a selected item always visible (no fully-collapsed boards; first tab opens when nothing is saved).

mindattic.com verbatim set (MAIL-A5). The UiUx PINFOOTER bundle: .pin-when-short pins while the document is shorter than the viewport. Authentic implementation; distinct from the generic widget.footer.

CSS-only activator: ships all .hw-* structural layout classes (.hw-hero, .hw-title, .hw-tagline, .hw-badge-row, .hw-section, .hw-stack-table, .hw-warn, .hw-btn, .hw-steps) shared by the Claudia and ChiMesh widgets and any future hardware project page.

Claudia project page: Pi Zero 2 WH + WonderEcho smart speaker running the Claude API. Shopping list, assembly steps, software setup, ASR/TTS config, healthcheck, run, case, troubleshooting, summary stack. Best used with the Hardware theme.

ChiMesh project page: three solar RAK4631 LoRa nodes running Meshtastic, deployed across Chicago rooftops. Shopping list, assembly, firmware flash, node config, deployment map, verify mesh, troubleshooting, summary stack. Best used with the Hardware theme.
mindattic.com verbatim set (MAIL-A5). The UiUx WEBSNAPSHOT bundle: .web-snapshot framed screenshot viewer (fetch or inline-base64 mode); window.WebSnapshot.autoInit() for late-built containers.

Self-contained mindattic.com frontpage widget. All CSS scoped under .maf-* (assets/maf.css); copyright-year JS runs as a scoped IIFE. Replaces the inline FrontpageBodyHtml/FrontpageCss/FrontpageJs seed constants.

Full product brochure for MindAttic.Ideas CMS: three-primitive model, token grammar, .idea package anatomy, DNN retrospective, feature comparison table, tech deep-dive, and get-started guide. CSS scoped under .ibr-*.
